hooks.command: echo '$FILES' | jq -r '.[] | select(endswith(".py"))' | xargs -r uv run black
echo '$FILES' | jq -r '.[] | select(endswith(".md"))' | xargs -r uv run mdformat
echo '$FILES' | jq -r '.[] | select(endswith(".yaml") or endswith(".yml"))' | xargs -r uv run yamlfix
echo '$FILES' | jq -r '.[] | select(endswith(".json"))' | xargs -r bash -c 'for f in "$@"; do jq "." "$f" > "$f.tmp" && mv "$f.tmp" "$f"; done' --
